verses.1: I will extol you, LORD, for you have raised me up,
verses.2: LORD my God, I cried to you,
verses.3: LORD, you have brought up my soul from Sheol.
verses.4: Sing praise to the LORD, you saints of his.
verses.5: For his anger is but for a moment.
verses.6: As for me, I said in my prosperity,
verses.7: You, LORD, when you favored me, made my mountain stand strong;
verses.9: “What profit is there in my destruction, if I go down to the pit?
verses.10: Hear, LORD, and have mercy on me.
verses.11: You have turned my mourning into dancing for me.
verses.12: to the end that my heart may sing praise to you, and not be silent.
